utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format has 7 required items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination is fully specified (Lisbon, Portugal). (2) travel_dates are specific (September 5–9, 2024). (3) transportation includes full flight details and cost (airline, airports, class, baggage, total cost, currency). (4) accommodation includes hotel details, ratings, amenities, location, and total cost. (5) activities include a named activity, duration, inclusions, and cost. (6) additional_services include a restaurant with name, cuisine, dietary accommodation, and cost. (7) total_budget includes total cost, currency, and budget compliance. All seven items are present and fully detailed per the format requirements.
